info.english_meaning: to be spoiled to act crucked to fly to run away to sleep
info.hindI_arTa: burI cAla calanA BAganA uq0a jAnA sonA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: kutsitagatiH = palAyanam  nindA ca  svApe nipUrvakoyam  ' dE svapne drAyati drAti kutsite gamane luki ' (Slo. 6) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra vIrayA Sucayo dadrire vAm' (f॰7.90.1) pradadrire pradadruH pradrARA dInA aBUvannityarTaH
'yatra suptvA punarnAvadrAsyanBavati' (Sa0 brA0 32223) nAvadrAsyanBavati=nidrAlurna Bavati nidrayA nABiBUyata ityarTaH
'yadi nidrAyAt kAmaM svapyAt' (Sa0 brA0 39311) yadi nidrAyAd yadi pramIlitaH syAt yadi pracalAyitaH syAt
'na taM tigmaM cana tyajo na drAsadaBi taM guru' (f0 8477) aBidrAsat AsAdayati drAteH paYcame lakAre tipi rUpam
